roadmap.title: Act 1 — start every counter
roadmap.description: Choose every lifepath line, use pistols and quickhacks, and quicksave before access points. Finish The Heist, then begin Act 2 with all cumulative counters moving.

roadmap.title: Act 2 — protect missable questlines
roadmap.description: Progress all five character chains, rescue Takemura, collect Johnny's missable gear, and enter Phantom Liberty. Keep rotating ranged, melee, hacking, and time-slow kills.

roadmap.title: Open world and Dogtown cleanup
roadmap.description: Before the major endings, clear district icons, cyberpsychos, fast travel, vehicles, crafting, Dogtown gigs, Relic terminals, and the remaining counters.

roadmap.title: Phantom Liberty branch reloads
roadmap.description: Make a permanent manual save in Firestarter. Run both branches, add saves at the Somewhat Damaged core and Killing Moon train, and preserve the post-King of Swords save for The Tower.

roadmap.title: Main-game ending reloads
roadmap.description: Reload the post-King of Swords save for The Tower. Then use the Embers save for The Sun, which also awards The World, followed by The Star, Temperance, and The Devil.

achievements.description: Finish the prologue.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Finish the prologue.

guide.context: This is automatic during the main story.

steps.text: Complete The Rescue and continue through the prologue.

achievements.description: Steal the Relic.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Steal the Relic.

guide.context: This is automatic in Act 1.

steps.text: Complete The Heist.

achievements.description: Find Alt Cunningham.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find Alt Cunningham.

guide.context: This is an automatic Act 2 story achievement.

steps.text: Complete Transmission in the Pacifica storyline.

achievements.description: Interrogate Anders Hellman.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Interrogate Anders Hellman.

guide.context: This is automatic in Panam's main-job branch.

steps.text: Complete Life During Wartime.

achievements.description: Find Hanako Arasaka.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find Hanako Arasaka.

guide.context: This is automatic late in Act 2.

steps.text: Complete Search and Destroy.
steps.note: Save Takemura during this mission if you want The Devil on this run.

achievements.description: Complete the main storyline.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete any main-game ending.

guide.context: Every normal ending awards this after the credits; the game can return you to the point of no return.

steps.text: Finish any ending through Nocturne OP55N1.
After the credits, choose Sure, Just One More Gig to return before Embers and pursue the others.

achievements.description: Help Takemura avenge Saburo Arasaka.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Help Takemura avenge Saburo Arasaka.

guide.context: Takemura must survive Search and Destroy, so protect this route before reaching Embers.

steps.text: During Search and Destroy, ignore the exit prompt after the floor collapses; turn left through the gap, climb upstairs, rescue Takemura, and escort him out.
steps.note: Confirm he is present when you leave the building.

steps.text: At the Nocturne rooftop, choose Think trusting Arasaka's risky but worth it and follow Hanako's route.
Complete Where Is My Mind.

achievements.description: Leave Night City with the Aldecaldos.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Leave Night City with the Aldecaldos.

guide.context: Finish Panam's entire side-job chain before meeting Hanako at Embers.

steps.text: Complete Riders on the Storm, With a Little Help from My Friends, and Queen of the Highway.
At the Nocturne rooftop choose Gonna ask Panam for help, call Panam, and take the Omega Blockers.
In Mikoshi, choose Enter the well so V returns to the body; finish All Along the Watchtower.

achievements.description: Become a legend of the Afterlife.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Become a legend of the Afterlife.

guide.context: Unlock Rogue's ending route by finishing Chippin' In and Blistering Love.

steps.text: Finish Chippin' In, befriend Johnny at the oil fields, call Rogue, and complete Blistering Love.
At the Nocturne rooftop choose Think you and Rogue should go, then take the pseudoendotrizine.
In Mikoshi, cross the bridge with Alt so Johnny leaves the body; finish Path of Glory.

achievements.description: Let Johnny keep V's body.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Let Johnny keep V's body.

guide.context: Use either Panam's or Rogue's unlocked assault route, then make the opposite Mikoshi body choice.

steps.text: Enter Mikoshi through the Panam or Rogue ending route.
Choose the outcome where Johnny keeps the body; finish New Dawn Fades.

achievements.description: Complete River Ward's storyline.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Complete River Ward's storyline.

guide.context: River's chain begins with I Fought the Law; do not abandon Randy during The Hunt.

steps.text: Complete I Fought the Law and The Hunt; rescue Randy at Edgewood Farm.
Accept River's help request at Joss's home and complete Following the River.

achievements.description: Complete Kerry Eurodyne's storyline.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Complete Kerry Eurodyne's storyline.

guide.context: Kerry's seven-job chain opens after Johnny and Rogue's Chippin' In branch.

steps.text: Complete Holdin' On, Second Conflict, A Like Supreme, and Rebel! Rebel!.
Continue with I Don't Wanna Hear It, Off the Leash, and Boat Drinks.
steps.note: Wait or skip time and drive around between calls; follow Kerry into the diner during Rebel! Rebel!.

achievements.description: Complete Judy Alvarez's storyline.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Complete Judy Alvarez's storyline.

guide.context: Judy's chain starts after Double Life. Choices in Pisces can end the chain early.

steps.text: Complete Both Sides, Now, Ex-Factor, and Talkin' 'Bout a Revolution; agree to help Judy.
In Pisces, reject Maiko's takeover plan and refuse her payment.
steps.note: Make a manual save before the penthouse conversation.

steps.text: Wait for Judy's call and complete Pyramid Song.

achievements.description: Complete Panam Palmer's storyline.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Complete Panam Palmer's storyline.

guide.context: Panam's jobs are required for The Star ending.

steps.text: Complete Riders on the Storm without leaving the timed objective.
Complete With a Little Help from My Friends.
Leave camp, wait about 24 hours, return, and finish Queen of the Highway.

achievements.description: Watch Bushido X with Rogue.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Watch Bushido X with Rogue.

guide.context: This is awarded during Blistering Love, which follows Chippin' In.

steps.text: At Johnny's grave in Chippin' In, choose: The guy who saved my life > Nah, fucked that up too > What do you want from me? > OK. But as second chances go, this is your last.
Continue: You were a real dick in the beginning > When you said you let down your friends... > Smasher biz really got to her > Yeah, I'll call Rogue.
Call Rogue and complete Blistering Love.

achievements.description: Collect all items that once belonged to Johnny Silverhand.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Collect all six Johnny Silverhand items required by Breathtaking.

guide.context: Three clothing items are automatic; collect the Malorian Arms 3516, Pants, and Shoes yourself. Johnny's Porsche is optional and does not count.

steps.text: Keep the Tank Top from Tapeworm; the Aviators and Samurai Jacket are automatic in Chippin' In.
In Chippin' In, take the Malorian Arms 3516 from Grayson.
steps.note: The Porsche 911 II (930) in the shipping container is a separate optional collectible, not an achievement requirement.

steps.text: Loot Johnny's Pants from the bedroom suitcase during Heywood gig Psychofan.
steps.note: The apartment becomes inaccessible after the gig.

steps.text: Loot Johnny's Shoes from the locker during Westbrook gig Family Heirloom.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Watson.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear Watson's gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Only journal Gigs and blue NCPD activities count; ordinary Side Jobs and vehicles do not.

steps.text: Raise Street Cred and progress Act 2 until Regina's full Watson gig set is available.
Use the map filters to clear every Watson Gig, Assault in Progress, Suspected Organized Crime, and Reported Crime.
Read shards and finish any follow-up objective; wait for the fixer completion call before assuming the district is done.

achievements.description: Complete all Cyberpsycho Sightings.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete every Cyberpsycho Sighting.

guide.context: Regina's Psycho Killer chain contains 17 sightings.

steps.text: Resolve all 17 Cyberpsycho Sighting jobs as their icons unlock.
Open Regina's message for each case and send the requested reply.
Return to Regina after Psycho Killer updates and close the job.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Pacifica.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear Pacifica's gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Dogtown is separate; clear the base-game Pacifica map icons.

steps.text: Complete every Pacifica Gig and blue NCPD activity.
Finish any Reported Crime follow-up and wait for the fixer call.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in the Badlands.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear the Badlands' gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Dakota's gigs and the blue desert activities count.

steps.text: Complete every Badlands Gig and blue NCPD activity.
Follow Reported Crime chains to their final stash and wait for Dakota's completion call.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Westbrook.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear Westbrook's gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Sweep Japantown, Charter Hill, and North Oak.

steps.text: Complete every Westbrook Gig and blue NCPD activity.
Finish multi-part crime objectives and wait for Wakako's completion call.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Heywood.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear Heywood's gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Sweep Wellsprings, The Glen, and Vista del Rey.

steps.text: Complete every Heywood Gig and blue NCPD activity.
Do not leave Psychofan without Johnny's Pants; finish all follow-ups and wait for Padre's call.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Santo Domingo.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear Santo Domingo's gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Sweep Arroyo and Rancho Coronado.

steps.text: Complete every Santo Domingo Gig and blue NCPD activity.
Finish all Reported Crime follow-ups and wait for El Capitan's completion call.

achievements.description: Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in City Center.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear City Center's gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles.

guide.context: Sweep Downtown and Corpo Plaza.

steps.text: Complete every City Center Gig and blue NCPD activity.
Finish all follow-ups and wait for Dino's completion call.

achievements.description: Install at least one implant in each system and body part.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Install cyberware in every body category.

guide.context: Use any ripperdoc and buy the cheapest implant for each empty category.

steps.text: On patch 2.x, fill Frontal Cortex, Face, Circulatory, Nervous, Integumentary, Operating System, Skeleton, Hands, Arms, and Legs.
Leave the ripperdoc screen after all 10 current categories visibly contain at least one implant.
steps.note: A manual save lets you reload and recover the money; old guides incorrectly list the removed Immune category.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate 3 enemies in quick succession with a revolver or pistol in close combat.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat three nearby enemies rapidly with a pistol or revolver.

guide.context: All three must fall within about 3.5 seconds and from no more than roughly five metres.

steps.text: Quicksave beside a low-threat group of at least three enemies.
Move within five metres and kill or incapacitate all three with a pistol or revolver in one short burst.
steps.note: Johnny's one-shot Malorian sequences are an easy natural opportunity.

achievements.description: Complete a Breach Protocol with a minimum of 3 daemons uploaded.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Upload three daemons in one Breach Protocol.

guide.context: On patch 2.x, use a physical access point; camera and perk methods from old guides were removed.

steps.text: Find an access point, preferably an early Watson antenna or wall terminal, and quicksave before jacking in.
Plan a path that completes Basic, Advanced, and Expert Datamine within the buffer, then enter it.
steps.note: The timer does not begin until the first code is selected.

steps.text: If the matrix cannot fit all three sequences, reload the pre-access-point save for a new grid.

achievements.description: Reach the max level in any skill.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Raise one Skill Progression category to level 60.

guide.context: Since Update 2.0 the five skills are Headhunter, Netrunner, Shinobi, Solo, and Engineer; attribute level 20 does not count.

steps.text: Pick one playstyle early and use it consistently: headshots for Headhunter, hacks for Netrunner, blades/mobility for Shinobi, heavy weapons or blunt combat for Solo, or crafting/tech actions for Engineer.
Loot Skill Shards and check Character > Skill Progression periodically.
Continue until that skill—not V's level or an Attribute—reaches 60.

achievements.description: Shoot an enemy grenade in midair with a revolver.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Shoot an enemy grenade out of the air with a revolver.

guide.context: The projectile must be airborne; a revolver is required.

steps.text: Leave one grenade-using enemy alive and keep medium distance with a revolver drawn.
When the grenade leaves their hand, use time-slow cyberware if available and shoot the airborne grenade.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate 2 enemies with the same sniper rifle shot.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill two enemies with one sniper-rifle shot.

guide.context: Line up two unalerted enemies so both heads occupy the same shot path.

steps.text: Find two low-threat enemies standing close together and quicksave.
Move until their heads overlap, then fire a high-damage sniper rifle through both heads.

achievements.description: While Berserk cyberware is active, perform a Superhero Landing to kill or incapacitate 2 enemies.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat two enemies with one Berserk Superhero Landing.

guide.context: Equip a Berserk operating system and use a sufficiently high ledge above two clustered targets.

steps.text: Quicksave, nonlethally incapacitate two enemies, and carry their bodies together below a tall ledge.
Activate Berserk, jump from the ledge, and trigger the heavy Superhero Landing directly onto both bodies.
steps.note: Using already-incapacitated targets makes the setup repeatable.

achievements.description: Use a dialogue option related to V's life path 10 times.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Choose ten lifepath-specific dialogue options.

guide.context: Only choices tagged Nomad, Streetkid, or Corpo for your selected origin count, and the supply is finite.

steps.text: Select every dialogue option displaying your lifepath tag from the start of the game.
The achievement unlocks on the tenth distinct tagged response; reload an earlier save or start another origin if you ignored too many.

achievements.description: Buy all vehicles available for purchase.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Buy every vehicle required by Autojock.

guide.context: On the current AUTOFIXER system, the required set is 23 base-game cars plus three base-game motorcycles; free rewards and later-added vehicles do not count.

steps.text: Reach Street Cred 50 and complete gigs so all required listings unlock in AUTOFIXER.
Save about €$1,379,000; sell high-tier loot and avoid unnecessary purchases until the vehicle fund is ready.

Buy the 23 cars: Quartz EC-T2 r660, Emperor 620 Ragnar, Thrax 388 Jefferson, Outlaw GTS, Supron FS3, MaiMai P126, Shion Coyote, Shion MZ2, Turbo-R 740, Type-66 Avenger, Type-66 Javelina, Type-66 Jen Rowley, Aerondight Guinevere, Caliburn, Colby C125, Colby CX410 Butte, Colby Little Mule, Galena G240, Galena Gecko, Mackinaw MTL1, Alvarado V4F 570 Delegate, Columbus V340-F Freight, and Cortes V5000 Valor.
Buy the three motorcycles: ARCH Nazaré, Brennan Apollo, and Yaiba Kusanagi CT-3X.
steps.note: If the achievement does not pop, recheck each base-game AUTOFIXER manufacturer page; do not count quest rewards or Update 2.3 vehicles.

achievements.description: Craft 3 Legendary items.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Craft three Tier 5 items.

guide.context: Update 2.0 renamed Legendary quality to Tier 5 and removed the old crafting-perk requirement.

steps.text: Reach a level where Tier 5 recipes/components are available and open Inventory > Crafting.
Craft any three orange Tier 5 items; Tier 5 crafting components themselves also count on current builds.
steps.note: Quicksave first if you want to recover the components.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate 3 enemies with one "Detonate Grenade" quickhack.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat three enemies with one Detonate Grenade quickhack.

guide.context: Use a cyberdeck operating system with the Detonate Grenade quickhack installed.

steps.text: Obtain a Tier 4 or better Detonate Grenade quickhack from a netrunner vendor, access-point loot, or an enemy drop.
Find three enemies clustered around the middle target and weaken them without separating the group.
Upload Detonate Grenade to the centre enemy so one blast kills or incapacitates all three.
steps.note: The three enemies near the Pershing Street or Pacifica fast-travel areas are common setups.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate 50 enemies while time is slowed.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat 50 enemies while time is slowed.

guide.context: The counter is cumulative; use Sandevistan or Kerenzikov.

steps.text: Equip a Sandevistan operating system or Kerenzikov nervous-system implant.
Activate the slow-time effect before each finishing blow until 50 enemies have been killed or incapacitated.

achievements.description: Perform the Distract Enemies quickhack 30 times without drawing attention to yourself.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Distract 30 enemies without being detected.

guide.context: Use Distract Enemies on devices while targets remain unaware.

steps.text: From stealth, scan radios, vending machines, screens, and other devices near enemies.
Upload Distract Enemies, wait for the target to react, then repeat on fresh devices or encounters until 30 register.
steps.note: A red combat state or detection invalidates that distraction.

achievements.description: After reviving with Second Heart, kill or incapacitate the enemy who killed you within 5 seconds.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill your killer within five seconds of Second Heart reviving you.

guide.context: Second Heart is a high-tier Circulatory implant available late in progression.

steps.text: Install Second Heart at a ripperdoc and find a lone low-threat enemy.
Lower the enemy's health, let that same enemy kill you, then allow Second Heart to revive V.
Immediately finish that enemy within 5 seconds.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate 300 enemies using ranged weapons.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat 300 enemies with ranged weapons.

guide.context: This cumulative counter includes firearms across the playthrough.

steps.text: Use pistols, rifles, shotguns, SMGs, LMGs, precision rifles, or snipers for finishing blows until 300 enemies are defeated.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate 100 enemies using melee weapons.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat 100 enemies with melee weapons.

guide.context: This cumulative counter includes blades and blunt weapons.

steps.text: Use katanas, knives, clubs, bats, hammers, or other melee weapons for finishing blows until 100 enemies are defeated.

achievements.description: Kill or incapacitate an enemy who threw a grenade at you.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill an enemy after they throw a grenade.

guide.context: The grenade only needs to leave the enemy's hand; you do not need to survive its explosion.

steps.text: Keep one grenade-using enemy alive at medium range.
Once they throw and the grenade is airborne, kill or incapacitate that enemy.

achievements.description: Find all the tarot graffiti for the job Fool on the Hill.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find all base-game tarot graffiti.

guide.context: The Fool on the Hill begins automatically in Act 2; the four Dogtown tarot cards are not part of this achievement.

steps.text: After leaving V's apartment in Act 2, track Fool on the Hill.
Visit and scan all 20 tarot graffiti icons around Night City and the Badlands.
Return to Misty after the quest updates.

achievements.description: Find all fast travel dataterms.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Discover every fast-travel dataterm required by the base game.

guide.context: Drive close enough to each dataterm for its blue marker to activate; Dogtown terminals are not required.

steps.text: Reveal map filters and sweep every Night City and Badlands district, driving past each blue dataterm icon.
Compare the outer highways, borders, and Metro: Memorial Park carefully if the achievement tracker stops short.
Enter each subdistrict and zoom the map; discovery is enough—you do not need to fast travel from every terminal.

achievements.description: Reach max Street Cred.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Reach maximum Street Cred.

guide.context: Street Cred caps at 50 and comes primarily from gigs, NCPD jobs, and side content.

steps.text: Complete gigs, NCPD Scanner Hustles, Cyberpsycho Sightings, and other open-world jobs until Street Cred reaches 50.

achievements.description: Fulfil Songbird's final request.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Fulfil Songbird's final request.

guide.context: This is one of two outcomes on Reed's Firestarter branch.

steps.text: In Firestarter, choose Help Reed capture Songbird.
Near the core at the end of Somewhat Damaged, make a manual save.
Choose Kill So Mi and confirm the request; finish Leave in Silence through the apartment conversation.

achievements.description: Refuse Songbird's final request.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Refuse Songbird's final request.

guide.context: Reload the Somewhat Damaged core save after King of Cups.

steps.text: Use the Help Reed capture Songbird branch in Firestarter.
At the Somewhat Damaged core choose Ain't over yet, That's not a solution, then Spare So Mi / Won't do it.
Complete Leave in Silence through the apartment conversation.

achievements.description: Send Songbird to the Moon.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Send Songbird to the Moon.

guide.context: This is one of two outcomes on Songbird's Firestarter branch.

steps.text: In Firestarter, choose Help Songbird escape.
In The Killing Moon, make a manual save after the train ride before meeting Reed.
Pick up and lay down Songbird, choose Can't let you take her, draw your weapon, and shoot Reed.
Place Songbird in the shuttle and finish the post-credits Johnny conversation.

achievements.description: Hand Songbird over to Reed alive.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Hand Songbird over to Reed alive.

guide.context: Reload the Killing Moon train save after King of Wands.

steps.text: On the train choose Call Reed, Wanna live on, and Deal.
Carry Songbird to Reed, lay her down, and choose Take good care of her.
Finish the post-credits Johnny conversation.

achievements.description: Complete Phantom Liberty's new main-game ending.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; protect before branch lockout.
achievements.summary: Complete Phantom Liberty's new main-game ending.

guide.context: This roadmap uses the King of Swords route: hand Songbird to Reed alive, then continue from that post-ending save.

steps.text: Preserve a manual save after King of Swords. If you later reload Firestarter for Cups or Pentacles, reload this live-Songbird post-ending save before continuing.
Wait for Reed's call and complete Through Pain to Heaven.
Start Who Wants to Live Forever, call Reed from the rooftop, and board the AV.
Finish Things Done Changed.
steps.note: Before the point of no return, reply to Viktor's cyberware-software text as a progression precaution.

achievements.description: Complete Run This Town.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Run This Town.

guide.context: Mr. Hands starts this side job while The Killing Moon is waiting for Songbird's news.

steps.text: During The Killing Moon, skip time and drive around until Mr. Hands calls.
Complete Run This Town; the disguise and dialogue outcome do not affect the achievement.

achievements.description: Save President Myers.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Save President Myers.

guide.context: This is automatic early in Phantom Liberty if the rescue is completed.

steps.text: Complete Hole in the Sky and get Myers to safety.

achievements.description: Complete every Gig in Dogtown.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete every Dogtown gig.

guide.context: Mr. Hands offers nine Dogtown gigs; his map counter also includes the older Pacifica gig Two Wrongs Makes Us Right.

steps.text: Complete Dogtown Saints, Treating Symptoms, Waiting for Dodger, Prototype in the Scraper, and The Man Who Killed Jason Foreman.
Complete Talent Academy, Heaviest of Hearts, Spy in the Jungle, and Roads to Redemption.
Wait for Mr. Hands's final thank-you call after the ninth Dogtown gig.

achievements.description: Eliminate three bosses from the "Increased criminal activity" category.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat all three Increased Criminal Activity bosses.

guide.context: The green triple-skull icons appear when you approach their Dogtown sites; none is missable.

steps.text: From Kress Street in south-west Dogtown, go slightly south, enter the tunnel base, pass the laser mines, and defeat the shielded boss.
At Dogtown's eastern edge, enter the large old production hall and defeat the boss beyond the electrified floor.
In the south-east amusement-park area, enter the space-shuttle exhibition hall and destroy the flying-drone boss.
steps.note: The achievement unlocks on the third boss; opening the three reward cages is optional.

achievements.description: Steal the Arasaka medical truck or deliver 10 vehicles to El Capitan.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete ten vehicle contracts or steal the Arasaka medical truck.

guide.context: El Capitan's green steering-wheel Mysterious Signal contracts are repeatable.

steps.text: Complete the first vehicle contract after Lucretia My Reflection unlocks them.
Successfully deliver 10 contract vehicles, obeying optional conditions only when practical.
Alternatively, complete the Arasaka medical-truck theft in Baby Let Me Take You; it can unlock the achievement before ten deliveries.

achievements.description: Defeat the Chimera.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Chimera.

guide.context: This is automatic during Phantom Liberty's opening main jobs.

steps.text: Complete the Chimera boss encounter in Spider and the Fly.

achievements.description: Unlock all Perks in the Relic Perk tree.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Unlock every perk in the Relic tree.

guide.context: There are 15 Relic points: six automatic story points and one from each of nine Restricted Data Terminals.

steps.text: Receive three points in Dog Eat Dog and three more during Birds with Broken Wings.
Find all 9 Restricted Data Terminals; their white Relic icons appear when V gets close.

Check the east warehouse and south-east shuttle-hall criminal-activity sites, the road under a bridge, a raised parking deck, beside Kress Street, inside the Kress tunnel base, a crane-accessed roof, the rear of EBM Petrochem Stadium, and the one-level-high building platform.
Spend all 15 Relic points so every Relic perk is active.

achievements.description: Become Dogtown's most wanted criminal.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Reach the maximum wanted level in Dogtown.

guide.context: The five-star meter must be earned while V is physically inside Dogtown.

steps.text: Quicksave in an open Dogtown area with cover and a vehicle nearby.
Attack Barghest or police and keep defeating reinforcements without leaving Dogtown until the meter reaches 5 stars.
Escape or reload after the achievement unlocks.
